text.title: AI Risk Aging Agent Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether ai-risk-aging-agent applies. Root question is a concrete observable; branches name a specific input pattern (`when`) and conclude with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the project in active rescue AND the risk register machine-readable AND owners reachable?

branch.when: yes AND any risk older than 14 days unflagged

example.description: When the root condition holds and the first matching branch fires, the tree concludes with the referenced rule id — meaning the methodology applies via that rule. The agent loads the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follows it. When the root condition does not hold, the tree concludes with `skip-methodology`.
